sections.title: White Papers & Playbooks
sections.subtitle: In-depth research and frameworks for sustainable fashion, brand purpose, and retail activation.

left.alt: Mind the Gap: Policy to Profit in Fashion white paper cover

right.body:
## Mind the Gap: Policy to Profit in Fashion

**How new rules can create commercial wins for fashion**

Grounded's seminal white paper examines how evolving policy creates real commercial opportunity for fashion brands — featuring legal expertise and AI-powered recommendations via Gaia.

left.body:
## Articulating Brand Purpose: The BPP Framework

**Connect the WHY of purpose to the WAY of profit**

Published by the ANA Center for Brand Purpose, this playbook is recognised globally as a best-in-class approach for articulating brand and corporate purpose.

left.alt: Retail Activation for Good playbook cover

right.body:
## Excellence in Execution: Retail Activation for Good

**Activate brand purpose and sustainability at the shelf**

Built on three years of proprietary research and consultation with the world's largest brand owners and retailers — frameworks, tools, and case studies for retail activation.

sections.heading: It's time to get grounded
sections.subtext: Ready to activate your brand purpose and accelerate your impact? Let's talk.
